headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - Section 13. The Subcontractor shall promptly pay, and shall indemnify, defend and hold harmless the Owner and Contractor against, all costs or claims for transportation, freight and express, on men, materials and equipment to and/or from the job, and for all other incidental expenses in connection with the Subcontract Work, and shall prepay the transportation charges on all materials, etc., shipped to the Project, and all such costs and expenses are included in the Subcontract Sum.
